title: The Ending of the End of Evangelion
display_title: The Ending of the End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 4:33 am Now I've just finished the EoE DVD. A sad ending it has... But it's rather strange. When Unit 01 became the Tree of Life, Shinji became in charge of the numerous lives on earth (actually we should have all died), and initially Shinji agreed to take back all lives, but then he seemed to favour getting back to earth and live as before, with all humans having their AT Fields on. Then as he wished Shinji went back to earth, but all other poeple didn't come back! Wasn't he wishing to live normally as we're living now? Why did only Shinji and Asuka come back with their AT Fields on but not the other poeple? Wasn't Shinji having control of all lives on earth from the moment Unit 01 became the Tree of Life? And there was this moment in the movie that all red dots separated and went back to earth. Didn't this symbolise the return of souls to humans? Can anyone do the courtesy to explain how this thign worked out? And you could see when Shinji and Asuka came back to earth Asuka had already had her wounds wrapped up... I wonder who did that to her. The harpies...?

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Mon Jul 17, 2006 4:55 am Yes, the end was rather weird. Asuka's wounds... I don't really know about this, But for some reason I think there's a connection between the bandage and the LCL. I don't really know more about it, I'm stupid. :/

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:05 am I would bet there is an first aid kit probably in the entry plug, after all there is a phone in there....

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:08 am Maybe there would be a toilet there... Shinji had stayed in Unit 01 when confronting the 12th Angel... He needed to have a leak sometimes throughout his time in the Sea of Dirac...

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:09 am SEELE 08 wrote: I would bet there is an first aid kit probably in the entry plug, after all there is a phone in there....

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:49 am Light of the Dawn wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: I would bet there is an first aid kit probably in the entry plug, after all there is a phone in there....

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 7:01 am But she revived like everyone else. So she could have done this herself.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 7:11 am tinmeigut wrote: But she revived like everyone else. So she could have done this herself.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 7:13 am I heard that also... But at the ending scene you could only see Asuka and Shinji and the half head of GNR... I really want to make it clear if other poeple have come back...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 17, 2006 1:37 pm tinmeigut wrote: Shinji had stayed in Unit 01 when confronting the 12th Angel... He needed to have a leak sometimes throughout his time in the Sea of Dirac...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:23 pm Asuka most certainly dies with Mama. By that point, physical damage incurred during actual powered synchronization is transferred directly to Asuka, as evidenced by the split arm. Off-screen, the subsequent showering of seven spears would have killed Asuka much faster than they did Kyoko. (It was only the ninth that got Kyoko in the core and finally did her in.) Suggestions that Asuka somehow survived that are pretty "out there". <_< Mr. Tines wrote: Whichever, there has been an end to Evangelion.

[]: Re: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by bp32 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:30 pm tinmeigut wrote: A sad ending it has...

[]: Re: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:47 pm bp32 wrote: tinmeigut wrote: A sad ending it has...

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:58 pm I was sort of left with the feeling of 'anything could happan next'. The Sea of LCL could suddenly turn into people who will rebuild Tokyo, Shinji might suddenly wake up with Asuka telling him to wake up for school like in the Alternate Reality, And GNR's head might suddenly come to life and ask for a smoke (That would probably give me a stroke). I was left with the feeling of 'don't expect anything'.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:06 pm I figured that people would come back when they were ready. Yui's little talk with Shinji gives up plenty of hope that things will work out. The one more final scene Im convinced was Anno giving us one more mind fuck for the road.

[]: Re: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:29 pm tinmeigut wrote: And you could see when Shinji and Asuka came back to earth Asuka had already had her wounds wrapped up... I wonder who did that to her. The harpies...?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:33 pm I always liked to incorporate the artwork on the box with the ending. Shinji and Asuka just by each other waiting for the others to return, which I do believe will happen. Otherwise why would Anno even have Yui mention something about it? DatDude wrote: The one more final scene Im convinced was Anno giving us one more mind fuck for the road.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:44 pm Hunter21 wrote: DatDude wrote: The one more final scene Im convinced was Anno giving us one more mind fuck for the road.

[]: Re: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 17, 2006 4:28 pm thewayneiac wrote: Asuka reembodied with bandages. It's the same principle as Shinji manifesting a plug suit in ep. 20 even though he was piloting in his street clothes in ep. 19.

[]: Re: The Ending of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Jul 17, 2006 6:06 pm Reichu wrote: thewayneiac wrote: Asuka reembodied with bandages. It's the same principle as Shinji manifesting a plug suit in ep. 20 even though he was piloting in his street clothes in ep. 19.
